items.rationale: Many separate crews, no registry or named owner visible — inventory is exactly what a repo this broad needs.
Credentials read from the environment flow into outbound calls in several crews — a possible egress path to verify per crew.
The pinned lockfiles carry many known-vulnerable dependencies (for example aiohttp and idna) with open advisories.
No human-approval step is visible around high-consequence actions across the crews.
Whether a tested kill-switch exists can't be seen from the code.
